title: chloraea volkmannii
intro: Chloraea volkmannii, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chloraea volkmannii include its use as a natural expectorant to help relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with allergies. Herbal preparations of Chloraea volkmannii can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
